_comment: Per-agent default scope for the autopilot routines. CLI args to /autopilot-tick override these. To activate a change, commit + push to dev.
_format: Values are null (no scope) OR 'epic:FN-XXX' OR 'lane:<slug>'. Example: 'backend': 'epic:FN-1090' or 'frontend': 'lane:billing-redesign'.
_active_focus: Roadside AI v2 — Epic 1: AI Triage Engine (FN-1140). Foundation epic; unblocks Voice Intake (FN-1144), Vision (FN-1147), Real-time Status (FN-1150). All 3 active agents focus here until Epic 1 is Done, then shift to the next active epic (likely FN-1153 Vendor Network or FN-1157 Driver Portal UX).
